title: Responses to post-inspection surveys: inspections and visits between 1 April 2024 and 31 March 2025
body: " We have produced this data as official statistics in development; formerly called experimental statistics. These are official statistics that are undergoing a development. For more information, see the official statistics in development section in the methodology.   These statistics are about survey responses Ofsted received following inspections and visits of:   state-funded schools independent schools further education and skills providers early years providers social care providers   The statistics consist of:   main findings underlying data in ODS format methodology pre-release access list   Official statistics are produced impartially and are free from political influence. "
